head: caf3e5d

completed_tasks.name: Pushed workspace/go-live (48 commits, Phase 1-2 go-live work), created PR #71, merged into main as 4c3e386 before starting Phase 3 discussion (per user request).
Re-ran init.phase-op '3' --ws go-live (clean restart), confirmed no USER-PROFILE.md (ADVISOR_MODE=false), no flags, default discuss mode.

Read PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, STATE.md, 02-CONTEXT.md, 01-CONTEXT.md, ROADMAP.md (Phase 3 section). cross_reference_todos: todo.match-phase '3' returned 0 matches. scout_codebase: no .planning/codebase/*.md maps; grepped infra/scripts/run-aws-mdm-e2e.sh and edgar_warehouse/mdm/cli.py (sync-graph/verify-graph), and 01-LAUNCH-GATE-MATRIX.md MDM/hosted-graph BLOCKED rows + Required Production Identifiers.

Presented 4 gray areas via AskUserQuestion (multiSelect). User selected 3: 'Phase 3 scope given prod AWS blocker', 'MDM secret population runbook (MDM-01)', 'Acceptance-vs-debug framing for --status-only/--skip-preflight'. NOT selected: 'Dev hosted-graph E2E precedent refresh'.
Discussed and resolved 'Phase 3 scope given prod AWS blocker' (4 questions, all answered). Checkpoint written after completion.
Discussed and resolved 'MDM secret population runbook (MDM-01)' (4 questions, all answered). Checkpoint updated after completion.

remaining_tasks.name: Discuss 'Acceptance-vs-debug framing for --status-only/--skip-preflight' (4 single-question AskUserQuestion turns per default.md mode, then the 'More questions or move to next?' check). This is the last selected gray area.

After area 3 completes: 'We've discussed [areas]. Which gray areas remain unclear?' — options 'Explore more gray areas' / 'I'm ready for context'. Likely 'I'm ready for context' given only 3 areas were selected and all are now resolved.

write_context: Read workflows/discuss-phase/templates/context.md (lazy-loaded), then write .planning/workstreams/go-live/phases/03-mdm-hosted-graph-e2e-acceptance/03-CONTEXT.md using the checkpoint's accumulated decisions (areas 1-3) plus the canonical_refs list already accumulated in 03-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json.
confirm_creation: present summary of decisions captured + next steps (/clear then /gsd:plan-phase 3 go-live).

git_commit: Read workflows/discuss-phase/templates/discussion-log.md (lazy-loaded), write 03-DISCUSSION-LOG.md from the discussion log accumulator (area names, options presented, user selections — already captured in 03-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json's decisions block, reuse that data). rm -f 03-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json. gsd-sdk query commit 'docs(03): capture phase context' --files 03-CONTEXT.md 03-DISCUSSION-LOG.md.
update_state: gsd-sdk query state.record-session --stopped-at 'Phase 3 context gathered' --resume-file 03-CONTEXT.md, then commit STATE.md.

blockers.description: infra/aws-prod-application.json does not exist (prod AWS passive infra Terraform not applied — carried forward from Phase 2). run-aws-mdm-e2e.sh --env prod hard-fails its file-existence check before doing anything.
blockers.workaround: Decided in Area 1: Phase 3 will live-reproduce this via 'bash infra/scripts/run-aws-mdm-e2e.sh --env prod --status-only' (read-only) as concrete BLOCKED-row proof, same pattern as Phase 2's SNOW-01 backend.hcl reproduction.

blockers.description: The 4 edgartools-prod/mdm/* secrets (postgres_dsn, neo4j, api_keys, snowflake) don't exist yet (prod Terraform not applied).
blockers.workaround: Decided in Area 2: document full put-secret-value commands w/ placeholders for postgres_dsn + snowflake only; neo4j = legacy/N/A under Snowflake-hosted graph; api_keys deferred (purpose unclear).

blockers.description: Dev MDM Postgres re-verification (decided in Area 1, MDM-01 question) has NOT been run yet — it's a planning decision for the eventual Phase 3 plan/execution, not something done during discuss-phase.
blockers.workaround: This is downstream work for plan-phase/execute-phase, not discuss-phase. Captured as a decision in the checkpoint for the planner to act on.

decisions: Phase 3 scope: dev rehearsal run (run-aws-mdm-e2e.sh --env dev) + documentation, NOT pure document-and-validate-only like Phase 2 D-01.
Live-reproduce run-aws-mdm-e2e.sh --env prod --status-only structural blocker as BLOCKED-row proof.
MDM-01: re-verify dev MDM Postgres connectivity/migration/counts live as dev-precedent refresh, in addition to documenting prod commands.
GRAPH-01/GRAPH-02: cite existing 03-LIVE-DEV-RUN.md as dev precedent, no new live hosted-graph verify run.
MDM secret population runbook: full put-secret-value commands w/ placeholders for postgres_dsn + snowflake; neo4j=legacy/N/A; api_keys deferred.
Use dev MDM Postgres DSN shape (no values) as a reference for the prod postgres_dsn secret format.
Evidence for secret population: aws secretsmanager describe-secret presence check only (non-secret).
